text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki has performed exceptionally well
in the first three years of the Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even in a generation full of formidable racers, she
kept on running undauntedly and succeeded in
attaining tangible results.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: However, her battles continue...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Trainer, I've finished my interval sprints!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Ah, there she is! Hey, Yaeno!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: You've got a visitor!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: A visitor... for me?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Grampa?!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno's Grandfather
text_block_list.text: Hello to you too, Yaeno.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
He stopped me by the academy gates, so I
invited him in!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, I'll handle the visitor paperwork while
you two catch up!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: To what do I owe the pleasure?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno's Grandfather
text_block_list.text:
Well, I was hoping to get permission to observe
your training. Would that be all right with you,
Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: You wish to observe my training?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Is it because I went against the teachings of the
Kongo Yaegaki style?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
After all, I defied the teachings which told me to
suppress my emotions and, instead, ran foolishly
in accord with my desire for praise...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno's Grandfather
text_block_list.text:
Yes... But not quite. I don't think you have gone
against our teachings.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: You don't?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno's Grandfather
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure you chose to do that out of necessity in
your pursuit of victory, since you were up against
such an array of mighty opponents.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno's Grandfather
text_block_list.text:
Long have you been plagued by your
overpowering thirst for competition. To you, that
is a weakness of the spirit.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno's Grandfather
text_block_list.text:
In order to unleash and master that competitive
drive, you had to tackle the root of your
problem—your own weakness.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno's Grandfather
text_block_list.text:
Conquering one's fault is not the only proof of
growth. Recognizing and accepting it is an
equally valid form of growth.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno's Grandfather
text_block_list.text:
Thus, it is not that you went against our
teachings... but that you have grown stronger.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: ...Master!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno's Grandfather
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, would it be correct to assume you
suggested that Yaeno unleash the fierce blaze
within her because you thought the same?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno's Grandfather
text_block_list.text:
Hence, I wanted to see with my own eyes the kind
of environment that fostered her growth.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Grampa...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Right! Let's head to the track, then! Come with
me!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff, huff...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Hmm... I feel like my time could've been better...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Still, you don't seem to be suffering any setbacks
from your extended hiatus. I'm impressed.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Agreed. In fact, I think your core and leg strength
have increased compared to before.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...At this rate, I'm going to be left behind. I have
to redouble my efforts.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Ehehe! Thanks for running with me today!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
It was a beneficial run for all of us, so don't
mention it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: That's right. Until next time.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: What did you think?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno's Grandfather
text_block_list.text: Those two are in the same year as you, correct?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Yes. They're not only my peers, but also dear
rivals.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
There's also Oguri, Bamboo, Creek, Inari, and
many others... I am blessed with a great number
of worthy adversaries.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Competing with racers like them is what allowed
me to grow stronger...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
And the days I spend battling them are so much
fun.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
With them, I'm able to let the fire inside me burn
as hot as I wish and face them with my true self
laid bare.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
The satisfaction of being able to do so is like no
other.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: That's why I wish to keep racing with them.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno's Grandfather
text_block_list.text: So that is the path you've chosen.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Yes, Master! I would like to continue building on
my own Kongo Yaegaki style through racing!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno's Grandfather
text_block_list.text: Then go forth! Follow the path you believe in!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Osu!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno's Grandfather
text_block_list.text: Hehe. It's gratifying to witness her growth...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno's Grandfather
text_block_list.text: But it also has a bittersweet tinge.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno's Grandfather
text_block_list.text:
Trainer. I hope you'll continue to take good care
of my granddaughter and guide her well.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki and I see her grandfather off at the
gates, then head back inside.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
In the end, all he did was observe our training
session.
choice_data_list: I think he was really happy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
From what I've heard, her grandfather once told
her that she would never be alone for as long as
he drew breath.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure he was overjoyed at the sight of her
competing and laughing with her friends, since
she's usually so standoffish.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell her that her grandfather was watching with a
smile on his face the entire time.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Grampa was smiling?! That's incredible...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... hehehe! It finally feels like he's
acknowledged my skill.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: ...I'm glad I chose to believe in you, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
You accepted me in my entirety and supported
me all this way...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: In turn, I wholeheartedly relied on you.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
If not for you, my feelings would still be
smoldering within me.
choice_data_list: That was all you and your own hard work.
That was all you and your own hard work.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Your constant praise is what has allowed me to
give it my best.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Hereafter, I shall do all I can to keep earning your
praise.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I hope you'll continue to accompany me on my
path from here on out.
